name: AI Marketing Suite
description: A complete AI marketing workspace for business owners — six plugins that work as a coordinated system. One setup wizard configures everything, five specialist tools activate automatically.
author: Epoch Two

plugins.name: AI Marketing Setup
plugins.description: Onboarding wizard that interviews you about your business and generates a personalised Business Context Block. Run this first to configure all other AI Marketing Suite plugins.

plugins.name: Email Strategist
plugins.description: Senior email marketing specialist. Writes emails, sequences, subject lines, and content calendars in your voice, for your audience.

plugins.name: Ad Copy Writer
plugins.description: Direct-response ad copywriter. Writes Facebook, Instagram, Google, YouTube, and LinkedIn ads — hooks, variants, and landing page copy.

plugins.name: Call Scripts
plugins.description: Sales communication specialist. Writes call scripts, DM sequences, objection handlers, and follow-up messages for your team and channels.

plugins.name: SOP Builder
plugins.description: Process documentation specialist. Turns rough descriptions into clean, step-by-step SOPs built around your confirmed tools, team, and workflows.

plugins.name: Knowledge Base
plugins.description: Brand knowledge architect. Builds and audits brand voice guides, service descriptions, FAQs, and competitive positioning docs.
